text: When CT findings remain indeterminate, FDG-PET should be considered before excluding malignancy.

claims.quote: When CT findings remain indeterminate, FDG-PET should be considered before excluding malignancy.

text: If no imaging or biopsy data are available, risk assessment should be considered insufficient rather than low risk.
